class.name: NavigationMeshAreaBox3D
class.brief_description: An axis-aligned area with a projected shape of box to affect navigation mesh geometry and traversal cost (when baked).
class.description: An axis-aligned area with a projected shape of box to affect navigation mesh geometry and traversal cost (when baked). [b]Note:[/b] To guarantee that the area affects the intended [NavigationMesh], make sure that 1. the area's origin is as close as possible to the source geometry, and 2. the [member NavigationMeshArea3D.navigation_layers] are different from the [NavigationRegion3D] you intend to bake with.

members.member: The size of the projected box on the xzy-axis. [b]Note:[/b] Changes require a re-baking of this area to the region.
